name: Pipes of Pestilence
description: If you play these pipes as a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you summon one {@creature Swarm of Corrupted Rats|WttHC} in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of yourself. The swarm is {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} to you and your allies for as long as you continue to play the pipes each round as a {@action Magic|XPHB} action. While {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly}, the swarm is under your control, obeys your commands, and takes no action other than to defend itself
